# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Go runtime as a parent image
FROM golang:1.17 AS builder

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the go.mod and go.sum files
COPY go.mod go.sum ./

# Download all dependencies
RUN go mod download

# Copy the source code into the container
COPY . .

# Build the Go application
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o main .

# Use a smaller base image to run the application
FROM alpine:latest

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the binary from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /app/main .

# Run the Go application
CMD ["./main"]
